mapper.sql: id, name, slug, description, user_id, article_count, usage_count, status, tag_version, create_time, update_time, deleted, deleted_time
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM tag ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT
FROM tag
name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR slug LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tag
name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR slug LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')

SELECT
FROM tag WHERE status = 1 AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY usage_count DESC

SELECT t.id, t.name, t.slug, t.description, t.article_count, t.usage_count, t.status, t.create_time, t.update_time, t.deleted, t.deleted_time FROM tag t JOIN article_tag at ON t.id = at.tag_id WHERE at.article_id = #{articleId} ORDER BY t.id ASC

SELECT
FROM tag WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT
FROM tag WHERE name = #{name} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1

SELECT
FROM tag WHERE slug = #{slug} AND deleted = 0 AND status = 1
SELECT DISTINCT a.user_id FROM article a JOIN article_tag at ON a.id = at.article_id WHERE at.tag_id = #{tagId} AND a.deleted = 0
SELECT tag_version FROM tag WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tag WHERE deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tag WHERE deleted = 0 AND (slug = '' or slug is null)
mapper.update: UPDATE tag SET article_count = article_count + #{articleCountChange}, usage_count = usage_count + #{usageCountChange}, update_time = now() WHERE id = #{tagId} AND deleted = 0
